sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_series (id UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_series (id, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 1.0, 2.0), (2, 3.0, 4.0), (3, 5.0, 6.0);
UPDATE test_series SET x_value = x_value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_series);
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_series LIMIT 2);
